description: Square 'LABOR NEWS' card in DOL's template. The background photo shows an industrial cleaning scene: a blue floor-scrubbing machine on a wet concrete floor with hose lines, a person (legs and coveralls) in the foreground, another person partly visible seated, and a yellow caution wet-floor sign at lower left. Overlaid is a small navy 'LABOR NEWS' tab and a bold white sans-serif headline on translucent navy ribbon blocks: 'Department of Labor secures agreement from cleaning contractor to pay penalties, take steps to prevent dangerous child labor employment.' A navy bar at lower right reads 'dol.gov/newsroom.'
notable_text: LABOR NEWS / Department of Labor secures agreement from cleaning contractor to pay penalties, take steps to prevent dangerous child labor employment / dol.gov/newsroom
